data.title: Arrive domain seed report
data.summary: Seed report describing Arrive as the June 12, 2025 EasyPark Group rebrand and broader urban-mobility platform spanning parking, transit payments, fleets, city planning, partners, and automotive data.

data.title: Arrive rebrand announcement
data.summary: Evidence for the rebrand, umbrella-brand strategy, and scope beyond a single parking app.

data.title: Arrive about us
data.summary: Evidence for the company narrative around 70+ years of urban-mobility heritage and the combined business footprint.

data.title: Parkopedia acquisition announcement
data.summary: Supports the automotive and in-car data-services aspect of the domain model.

data.title: Intent to acquire Passport
data.summary: Supports the enforcement and North American municipal workflow expansion logic in the domain model.

data.title: Proposed 500-person organization design for Arrive
data.summary: Recommended value-stream and platform structure covering parking, transit, fleets, partners, city intelligence, and shared platform foundations.
